title: DB::Exception: (total) memory limit exceeded while pushing to view
description:
### Company or project name
Naturalis Biodiversity Center
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
I want to create a aggregation table. Running the same code on CH version `25.9` and CH version `25.10`. On version `25.10` I get an error, see below.
Source table: `nyc_taxi.trips_small`
Materialized view: `nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10_mv`
Aggregation table: `nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10`
On CH version 25.9 the insert query into the source table runs without issues:
```
0 rows in set. Elapsed: 16.996 sec. Processed 6.00 million rows, 311.84 MB (353.05 thousand rows/s., 18.35 MB/s.)
Peak memory usage: 621.57 MiB.
```
On CH version 25.10 an error is thrown:
```
Elapsed: 56.346 sec. Processed 6.00 million rows, 305.63 MB (106.50 thousand rows/s., 5.42 MB/s.)
Peak memory usage: 13.80 GiB.
Received exception from server (version 25.10.1):
Code: 241. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: (total) memory limit exceeded: would use 14.06 GiB (attempt to allocate chunk of 4.15 MiB), current RSS: 13.87 GiB, maximum: 14.05 GiB. OvercommitTracker decision: Query was selected to stop by OvercommitTracker: while pushing to view nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10_mv. (MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)
```
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
Issue arises on CH version `25.10.1.3832`.
No issues on version `25.9.5.21`.
### How to reproduce
```sql
CREATE DATABASE nyc_taxi;
CREATE TABLE nyc_taxi.trips_small (
trip_id             UInt32,
pickup_datetime     DateTime,
dropoff_datetime    DateTime,
pickup_longitude    Nullable(Float64),
pickup_latitude     Nullable(Float64),
dropoff_longitude   Nullable(Float64),
dropoff_latitude    Nullable(Float64),
passenger_count     UInt8,
trip_distance       Float32,
fare_amount         Float32,
extra               Float32,
tip_amount          Float32,
tolls_amount        Float32,
total_amount        Float32,
payment_type        Enum('CSH' = 1, 'CRE' = 2, 'NOC' = 3, 'DIS' = 4, 'UNK' = 5),
pickup_ntaname      LowCardinality(String),
dropoff_ntaname     LowCardinality(String)
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
PRIMARY KEY (pickup_datetime, dropoff_datetime);
CREATE TABLE nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10
(
`pickup_latitude` Float64,
`pickup_longitude` Float64,
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE nyc_taxi.trips_large (
    trip_id             INT UNSIGNED,
    pickup_datetime     DATETIME,
    dropoff_datetime    DATETIME,
    pickup_longitude    FLOAT,
    pickup_latitude     FLOAT,
    dropoff_longitude   FLOAT,
    dropoff_latitude    FLOAT,
    passenger_count     TINYINT UNSIGNED,
    trip_distance       FLOAT,
    fare_amount         FLOAT,
    extra               FLOAT,
    tip_amount          FLOAT,
    tolls_amount        FLOAT,
    total_amount        FLOAT,
    payment_type        ENUM('CSH', 'CRE', 'NOC', 'DIS', 'UNK'),
    pickup_ntaname      VARCHAR(255),
    dropoff_ntaname     VARCHAR(255)
);
LOAD DATA INFILE 'path/to/trips_data.tsv' INTO TABLE nyc_taxi.trips_large FIELDS TERMINATED BY '\t' LINES TERMINATED BY '\n' IGNORE 1 LINES;

CREATE TABLE nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10_large (
    pickup_latitude FLOAT,
    pickup_longitude FLOAT,
    h3_cell BIGINT UNSIGNED,
    cnt INT UNSIGNED,
    pickup_ntaname_uniq VARCHAR(255),
    pickup_ntaname_top_app VARCHAR(255)
);

INSERT INTO nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10_large (pickup_latitude, pickup_longitude, h3_cell, cnt, pickup_ntaname_uniq, pickup_ntaname_top_app)
SELECT
    pickup_latitude,
    pickup_longitude,
    h3_cell,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pickup_ntaname) AS pickup_ntaname_uniq,
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pickup_ntaname ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1000) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_large) AS pickup_ntaname_top_app
FROM nyc_taxi.trips_large
GROUP BY pickup_latitude, pickup_longitude, h3_cell;
SELECT pickup_latitude, pickup_longitude, cnt FROM nyc_taxi.agg_h3_10_large WHERE cnt > 1000;
key_bug_features: Memory limit exceeded while pushing to materialized view
